```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

  wd:Q139637 wdt:P1193 ?character .
  ?character rdfs:label ?char_label .
  FILTER(lang(?char_label) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER NOT EXISTS {
    ?character wdt:P106 ?occ .
    VALUES ?occ {
      wd:Q29815 wd:Q19725 wd:Q14504
    }
  }
}
```
